title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Akzo Nobel India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Akzo Nobel India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Akzo Nobel India are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Ludhiana. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Akzo Nobel India:
Akzo Nobel India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Akzo Nobel India!
